description: Blocked plugins filtered from the PlugVault catalog. Entries can match by exact URL, owner name, or repo name pattern.

format.url: Full GitHub URL of the repo to block
format.reason: Why it was blocked: spam | malware | low-quality | duplicate | test-repo | abandoned | policy-violation
format.blocked_at: ISO date when the block was added

blocked_patterns.reason: Generic test repos with no real value
Demo repos not intended for production
